Title: Verify that POST /orders returns 201 Created and orderId when creating an order with one cart item, and that the cart is deleted
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token, a cart exists with one item.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a cart and add one random available product.
2. Send a POST request to /orders with the cartId, a random customer name, and comment using the bearer token.
3. Verify status code is 201 and retrieve the orderId.
4. Send a GET request to /carts/{cartId} and verify status code is 404.
5. Retrieve the order by ID and verify its fields match.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 201 Created with orderId and created=true.
• HTTP Status for GET cart: 404 Not Found (since cart is deleted upon order creation).
• HTTP Status for GET order: 200 OK with correct details and items.

Title: Verify that POST /orders returns 201 Created and orderId when creating an order with a cart containing multiple unique items, and that the cart is deleted
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token, a cart exists containing 5 unique items.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a cart.
2. Add 5 unique available products to the cart.
3. Send a POST request to /orders with the cartId, customer name, and comment.
4. Verify status code is 201 and retrieve the orderId.
5. Send a GET request to /carts/{cartId} and verify status code is 404.
6. Retrieve the order by ID and verify it contains all 5 items with matching product IDs and quantities.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 201 Created with orderId.
• HTTP Status for GET cart: 404 Not Found (since cart is deleted upon order creation).
• HTTP Status for lookup: 200 OK and the order items list matches the 5 unique items in the cart.

Title: Verify that POST /orders returns 401 Unauthorized and validation error when an invalid bearer token is used
Pre-conditions: A cart exists with items.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a cart and add one random available item.
2. Send a POST request to /orders with the cartId and customer name using an invalid token (e.g., "invalid_token_12345").
3. Retrieve the response and verify status code is 401.
4. Verify the error response contains "Invalid bearer token".
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 401 Unauthorized
• Response body contains an error object: {"error": "Invalid bearer token"}

Title: Verify that POST /orders returns 400 Bad Request and validation error when attempting to place an order with an empty cart
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token, a valid empty cart exists.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a new empty cart and retrieve cartId.
2. Send a POST request to /orders with the cartId and customer name using the valid token.
3. Retrieve the response and verify status code is 400.
4. Verify the error response contains "cart is empty".
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 400 Bad Request
• Response body contains an error object: {"error": "cart is empty"}

Title: Verify that POST /orders returns 400 Bad Request and validation error when placing an order with an invalid or non-existent cartId
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Define an invalid cart ID (e.g., "non_existent_cart_id_12345").
2. Send a POST request to /orders with the invalid cart ID and customer name using the valid token.
3. Retrieve the response and verify status code is 400.
4. Verify the error response contains "cartId".
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 400 Bad Request
• Response body contains an error object containing "cartId" validation details.

Title: Verify that POST /orders returns 400 Bad Request and validation error when attempting to place a duplicate order using the same cartId
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token, a cart exists with one item.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a cart and add an available product.
2. Send a POST request to place the first order. Verify status code is 201.
3. Attempt to place a second order using the exact same cartId.
4. Retrieve the response and verify status code is 400.
5. Verify the error response contains "Invalid or missing cartId".
Expected Result:
• First order creation returns 201 Created.
• Second order creation returns 400 Bad Request with an error object containing "Invalid or missing cartId".

Title: Verify that DELETE /orders/{orderId} returns 204 No Content and successfully deletes the order
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token, an order exists.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a cart and add an item.
2. Place an order to obtain orderId.
3. Send a DELETE request to /orders/{orderId} using the bearer token.
4. Verify the status code is 204.
5. Send a GET request to /orders/{orderId} and verify status code is 404.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 204 No Content
• Verification lookup returns 404 Not Found with error message "No order with id [orderId]".

2. Send a GET request to /orders using the bearer token.

Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 200 OK
• Response body contains an array of orders containing the specific order placed with matching fields.

Title: Verify the end-to-end flow of creating a new order, retrieving it by ID, verifying it in the orders list, deleting it, and verifying its deletion returns 404
Pre-conditions: Valid authentication token, an available product exists, and a new cart with the product added exists.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Create a new cart and add a valid available product with quantity = 1.
2. Send a POST request to /orders with the cartId, customerName, and comment using the bearer token.
3. Verify status code is 201 and retrieve the orderId.
4. Send a GET request to /orders/{orderId}. Verify status code is 200, and details match.
5. Send a GET request to /orders. Verify status code is 200 and the list contains the created order.
6. Send a DELETE request to /orders/{orderId}. Verify status code is 204.
7. Send a GET request to /orders/{orderId} and verify status code is 404.
Expected Result:
• Order creation returns 201 Created and orderId.
• Order lookup returns 200 OK with correct customerName, comment, and items.
• Order list lookup returns 200 OK and contains the created order.
• Deletion returns 204 No Content.
• Verification lookup returns 404 Not Found with error message "No order with id [orderId]".
